description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🆕 New (Published: June 21, 2026)

Why not make this year's Tanabata decorations at Kittus?

【Date and Time】

Sunday, July 5, 2026 (Reiwa 8)

10:00 a.m. to noon

1:00 p.m. to 3:00 p.m.

【Venue】

Hanno City Museum Kittus, Learning and Training Room

【Participation Fee and Registration】

Free

No advance registration required. Please come directly to the venue (Hanno City Museum Kittus).

【What You'll Do】

Make Tanabata decorations and decorate small bamboo branches.

You can take your finished creations home with you.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kyoikubu/hakubutsukan/tenji_moyooshimono/13715.html
summary: ℹ️ Hanno City Museum Kittus Kids Fair: Make Tanabata Decorations at Kittus and Display Them at Home
